common.offline: Offline mode — changes will sync when connection returns.

admin.discountsDescription: Create and manage discounts, promos, and combo offers.

employee.timeTrackingDesc: Log when staff arrive and leave. The POS is always available — this is separate.
employee.selectEmployeeDesc: Employees are added by the admin. Select your name to log your hours.
employee.noEmployees: No employees yet. Ask the admin to add staff in Admin → Employees.
employee.logTimeDesc: Record arrival and departure times for the selected employee.
employee.pickEmployeeFirst: Select an employee from the list first.
employee.selectTable: Select a table or start takeaway
employee.insufficientCash: Amount received is less than the total.
employee.receiptEmailNotConfigured: Email is enabled but Resend is not configured on the server
employee.timesheetDesc: Monthly timesheet — pick FROM and TO times per day. Breaks: −0.5 h for shifts over 7 h, −1 h for 14 h or more. Saves automatically.
employee.timesheetDescShort: Set start and end times for today. Review the month to see who worked when.
employee.timesheetBreakHint: Breaks deducted automatically: −0.5 h over 7 h, −1 h from 14 h. Saves when you change a time.
employee.timesheetMonthEditHint: Adjust FROM and TO for any day (9:00–22:00). Clears when both are empty. Saves automatically.
employee.timesheetInvalidRange: TO must be greater than FROM

products.title: Products & menu
products.subtitle: Manage categories, products, prices, and menu tax rates.
products.nameDePlaceholder: Optional — shown on POS in German
products.nameDeHint: POS only. Not synced to the Casa Fenicia website.
products.categoryFormDescription: Enter the name in Spanish and English.
products.productFormDescription: Configure the product, price, and tax rate.
products.posOnlyDescription: Visible on POS but hidden on the website (e.g. coffee toppings, add-ons).
products.comboComponentsHint: Set two groups with required quantities (e.g. 2 sfiha + 1 ayran). Drinks can list multiple options — the customer picks one. The combo applies only when the ticket matches exactly — nothing extra.
products.comboGroupsIncomplete: Add at least one product to both combo groups, or leave both empty.
products.bulkDeactivateDescription: {count} products will be deactivated. They will not be removed from order history.
products.deactivateCategoryDescription: The category will be hidden from the POS. Products are not deleted.
products.deactivateProductDescription: The product will be hidden from the POS. It will not be removed from order history.
products.removeProductDescription: Choose what to do with {name}. Deactivating hides it from the POS but keeps order history. Deleting removes it permanently (only if it never appeared on orders).
products.deleteBlockedHistory: This product appears on past orders and can only be deactivated, not deleted.
products.deleteBlockedCombo: This product is part of a combo. Remove it from combos or deactivate instead.
products.reactivateProductDescription: {name} will appear on the POS again.
products.importDescription: Upload a Casa Fenicia .xlsx export. Categories are created automatically. Columns used: name, name_en, category, price, available.
products.importFileHint: Sheet "Catalog" with columns sku, name, name_en, category, price, available
products.importUpdateExistingHint: Match by category + Spanish name. Updates price, English name, and availability.
products.importSuccess: Import complete — {created} created, {updated} updated, {categories} new categories
products.importPreviewError: Could not read the Excel file
products.bulkTaxTitle: Set tax rate for selected products
products.bulkTaxDescription: Apply the same tax rate to {count} selected products.
products.bulkTaxInvalid: Enter a valid tax rate between 0 and 100
products.bulkPriceDescription: Apply the same price to {count} selected products.
products.bulkPriceInvalid: Enter a valid price of zero or greater

tables.title: Table map
tables.paletteHint: Drag a table onto the canvas
tables.noTables: Add at least one table before saving
tables.selectTableHint: Select a table to edit its properties
tables.canvasHint: Drag tables to reposition. Use the corner handle to resize.

errors.duplicateNumber: That table number is already in use
errors.Unauthorized: You are not authorized to manage tables

discounts.title: Discounts & promos
discounts.description: Configure percentage, fixed, and combo discounts for the POS.
discounts.valueFixedHint: Amount subtracted from the order total.
discounts.comboPriceHint: Fixed price for the selected product bundle.
discounts.noProductsAvailable: No active products available. Add products first.
discounts.requiresCashPaymentHint: When enabled, staff cannot apply this discount to card payments.
discounts.timesUsed: {count, plural, =0 {Never used} one {# time} other {# times}}
discounts.noDiscounts: No discounts yet. Create your first promo on the left.

pos.splitCancelDescription: This removes the split setup and returns to a single payment for the full order.
pos.convertToTableDescription: Choose a free table for this order.
pos.convertToTakeawayDescription: This removes the table assignment and keeps the order as takeaway.
pos.convertTableOccupied: That table already has an open order
pos.emptyOrder: No items yet — add from the menu
pos.registerCacheCleared: Register cache was cleared by an admin. Local POS data has been reset.
pos.noOrder: Select a table or start takeaway first
pos.changePriceDescription: Set a new unit price for {name}. This only affects this order.
pos.changeTotalDescription: Set the amount to charge for this order. Line items are adjusted to match.
pos.changeTotalDescriptionSplit: Set the amount to charge for split {number}. Line items are adjusted to match.
pos.splitPaymentsInProgress: Finish split payments before changing the setup
pos.selectTableHint: Tap a table or Takeaway to open an order.
pos.emptyOrderHint: Add products from the menu on the right
pos.cancelTableConfirm: Delete all items and close this ticket? The table will be free again. This cannot be undone.
pos.searchResults: {count, plural, one {# dish found} other {# dishes found}}
pos.noSearchResultsHint: Try another name or clear the search to browse categories.
pos.customProductDescription: One-off line item for corrections or special charges. Price is tax-inclusive.
pos.customProductReasonPlaceholder: Why this custom item is being added
pos.customProductReasonRequired: Enter a reason for this custom item
pos.customProductTaxInvalid: Enter a valid tax rate between 0 and 100
pos.cancelOffline: Close table requires an internet connection
pos.onlineConfirmOffline: Confirming online orders requires an internet connection

orders.title: Order history
orders.subtitle: Review paid orders and issue refunds.
orders.noOrders: No orders match the selected filters.
orders.refundReasonPlaceholder: Describe why this refund is being issued
orders.bulkDeleteDescription: Permanently delete {count} orders and their refunds. Receipt numbers for remaining paid orders will be renumbered. This cannot be undone.
orders.bulkDeleteOpenHint: Open orders must be cancelled on the POS first

errors.generic: Could not issue refund. Try again.
errors.invalid_status: Only paid orders can be refunded.
errors.invalid_status_delete: Open orders cannot be deleted. Cancel them on the POS first.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to issue refunds.

employees.title: Employee management
employees.description: Manage staff accounts, roles, and performance.
employees.name: Name
employees.isOwnerHint: Owners can still use the POS but won't appear on the timesheet or clock-in list.
employees.addEmployeeDescription: Create a new staff account with login credentials.
employees.editEmployeeDescription: Update employee details or reset their password.
employees.removeEmployeeDescription: Choose what to do with {name}. Deactivating keeps their history but blocks sign-in. Deleting permanently removes them (only if they have no orders).
employees.deleteBlockedHistory: This employee has order history and can only be deactivated, not deleted.
employees.reactivateDescription: {name} will be able to sign in again.
employees.deactivateConfirmDescription: {name} will no longer be able to sign in.

timeTracking.title: Time tracking
timeTracking.description: Review shifts, edit entries, and export records.
timeTracking.noEntries: No time entries for this period.
timeTracking.timesheetTabHint: Log or adjust shifts for any day this month, including upcoming days.
timeTracking.timesheetTabEditHint: Set FROM and TO for each day (9:00–22:00). Clears when both are empty. Saves automatically.
timeTracking.timesheetOutOfRange: Only dates in the current month can be edited here
timeTracking.timesheetNoWorkers: No eligible employees for the timesheet.
timeTracking.bulkAttendanceDescription: Log the same shift for multiple employees on one day (current month only).
timeTracking.bulkAttendanceSelectedCount: {count, plural, one {# employee selected} other {# employees selected}}
timeTracking.bulkAttendanceSuccess: Attendance saved for {count, plural, one {# employee} other {# employees}}

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Configure business details, receipts, and POS defaults.
settings.businessSectionDescription: Details shown on receipts and reports.
settings.taxSectionDescription: Default tax rate and currency symbol for the POS.
settings.receiptSectionDescription: Optional header and footer text in both languages.
settings.kitchenSectionDescription: Enable automatic kitchen ticket printing from the POS.
settings.kitchenPrintingDescription: When enabled, kitchen tickets can be sent to a printer.
settings.mapSectionDescription: Default canvas size for the table layout editor.
settings.receiptEmailSectionDescription: Send tickets by email after payment using Resend. Requires RESEND_API_KEY on the server.
settings.receiptEmailEnabledDescription: Shows an optional email field in the payment dialog on the POS.
settings.receiptFromEmailHint: Use a verified domain in Resend, e.g. Casa Fenicia (receipts@yourdomain.com). Falls back to RESEND_FROM_EMAIL in .env.
settings.cashRegisterSectionDescription: Set the register balance after counting cash in the drawer. Only admins can change this.
settings.cashRegisterBalanceHint: Cash sales add to this balance; cash refunds subtract from it. Save settings to apply a new count.
settings.clearRegisterCacheDescription: Clears cached POS data on all register terminals (offline queue and local cart state). Open orders on the server are not deleted.
settings.clearRegisterCacheSuccess: Register cache clear signal sent. POS terminals will reset on their next refresh.

moneyTracking.title: Money tracking
moneyTracking.description: Live cash in the register, today's takings, and end-of-day close.
moneyTracking.balanceHint: Total physical cash in the drawer right now.
moneyTracking.openingFloatHint: Left from last close — not counted as today's revenue.
moneyTracking.closeDayDescription: Count the cash, edit the total if needed, remove everything except the float you leave for tomorrow. The register will reset to that amount.
moneyTracking.countedBalanceHint: Change this if your physical count differs from the system.
moneyTracking.floatToLeaveHint: Stays in the drawer overnight and is not counted as tomorrow's revenue.
moneyTracking.closeDaySuccess: Day closed — removed €{removed}, €{float} left in register
moneyTracking.closeDaySuccessAdjusted: Day closed — removed €{removed}, €{float} left (adjusted by €{adjustment} to match count)
moneyTracking.closeDayInvalid: Enter valid amounts — float cannot exceed counted cash

employeeOrders.title: Orders
employeeOrders.description: Open and paid orders stay here until the kitchen marks them done.
employeeOrders.markAllDoneSuccess: {count, plural, one {# order marked done} other {# orders marked done}}
employeeOrders.markAllDoneError: Could not mark all orders done

menuCards.comboDrinkNote: (includes espresso, cortado, Lebanese coffee or Lebanese tea)
menuCards.footerTagline: Authentic Lebanese flavour in the heart of Valencia
menuCards.empty: No active products to show. Add products in Products or reactivate hidden items.

luggageStorage.title: Luggage storage
luggageStorage.description: Track tourist luggage drop-offs — name, phone, email, bags, duration, and payment.
luggageStorage.addGuestDescription: Register a new luggage drop-off for a tourist.
luggageStorage.editGuestDescription: Update guest details, bags, duration, or payment.
luggageStorage.phoneHint: Select country code, then enter the rest of the number.
luggageStorage.guestEmailHint: Type the name part, then tap a provider to finish the address.
luggageStorage.bagCountHint: How many bags were dropped off (1–20).
luggageStorage.activeCount: {count, plural, one {# item still in storage} other {# items still in storage}}
luggageStorage.validationError: Check the guest details, duration, and bag count
